name: india_post_pincode
description: Post office details by PIN code or branch name search. Branch, delivery status, district, state. Government postal service. Free, no API key.

output_schema.post_offices: array of {name, branch_type, delivery_status, district, state}

contextual_description: India Post postal PIN code lookup. Returns all post offices in a PIN code area with branch type, delivery status, district, and state. Covers all 19,000+ PIN codes.
